contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 35
- Description: Autopilot Bugsnag self-improvement loop closed (outbound + inbound, end-to-end)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/39
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/134
  
  Details:
  Wired autopilot's outbound Bugsnag self-reporting and verified the closed-loop self-improvement cycle is functional in production.
  
  ## Loop architecture (now closed)
  
    autopilot crash / logger.error(...)
      → BugsnagHandler attached at logging.ERROR (PR #39)
      → Bugsnag dashboard
      → Bugsnag emails 'New error in <project>'
      → email_poller bugsnag_error classifier (PR #38, sender=@bugsnag.com)
      → AI/proposed fix PR labeled (PR #38)
      → AI/proposed fix Gmail label on source email (PR #38)
      → Gary reviews + merges (or rejects)
  
  ## Shipped this turn
  
  - truesight_autopilot PR #39 — outbound Bugsnag wiring (bugsnag>=4.7.0 dep, _init_bugsnag() in app/main.py reading BUG_SNAG_API + BUGSNAG_RELEASE_STAGE, BugsnagHandler attached to root logger at logging.ERROR, .env.example documents both vars).
  - agentic_ai_context PR #134 — AUTOPILOT_CODE_MODIFICATIONS §11 documents the closed loop (config, what-gets-reported, production-verification command, broader-than-autopilot project reach).
  - Local autopilot/.env synced to mirror production (added the AWS multi-account block — was lopsided after this morning's prod-only update).
  
  ## Production verification (already running, end-to-end)
  
  After deploying PR #39 and adding BUG_SNAG_API to /opt/truesight_autopilot/.env, the very first restart logged:
  - 'Bugsnag self-reporting enabled (release_stage=production, project_root=/opt/truesight_autopilot)'
  - '[nelanco] / [explorya] AWS CloudWatch connected' (multi-account still healthy)
  - AND immediately picked up a real Bugsnag email for [Krake Publisher] / S3CacheJsonPagesDiff@s3_cacher / HTTPError — classified as bugsnag_error by the inbound side. The classifier doesn't filter by project, so autopilot now triages errors from EVERY Bugsnag project Gary has, not just its own. Documented as a side benefit in §11.
  
  ## Operator next step
  Once one self-reported error roundtrips end-to-end (autopilot logger.error → Bugsnag → email → bugsnag_error → AI/proposed fix PR), the self-improvement loop is verified. Then the bugsnag_error v0.1 follow-up (from PR #38 docstring) generalizes from 'map autopilot project to autopilot repo' to a broader project-name → repo-name lookup table.
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/39
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/134
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 58.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
